extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows, excluding all “By” rows. Criminal proceedings against the company, subsidiaries, promoter, directors and group company are all Nil, giving 0; statutory/regulatory proceedings against subsidiaries and directors are 1 each, giving 2; tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries are 2 and 10, respectively, giving 12. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is ₹3.01 million plus ₹9,852.77 million, or ₹9,855.78 million; the latter includes the quantified subsidiary claim and is converted to ₹985.578 crore using 1 crore = ₹10 million. No contingent-liabilities table or stated contingent-liabilities Total is disclosed in this risk section, so no date or amount is available. Company-wide customer concentration for the full Financial Year 2024 is stated as a percentage of revenue from operations: top five client groups 79.16% and top ten client groups 91.41%; the source monetary tables use ₹ millions.
